overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character in a blue shirt and backpack visiting a food stall. The scene transitions from the interior of the stall to an outdoor seating area under a canopy, with industrial cyberpunk architecture and neon signage visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall interior with service counter

agents.ego_description: standing at the food counter looking through the wire mesh window at the vendor area

entered.detail: metal grid security screen covering the service window
wall covered with handwritten paper notes and orders
concrete counter with food items and disposable cups
stack of paper coffee cups on the counter
plate with food item on the left side of counter
yellow advertisement sign for pickles visible through the window
glowing purple and blue neon signs visible through left window

segments.scene_description: The character stands inside a narrow food stall facing a wire mesh service counter. The walls are covered with sticky notes, and disposable cups sit on the counter. Through the mesh window, a yellow 'PICKLES!' sign is visible in the adjacent room, illuminated by warm artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor seating area under purple canopy

events.description: character walks out of the food stall into the outdoor seating area
moving from shaded canopy into direct morning sunlight approaching the table

agents.ego_description: walking out from the food stall and approaching a table with two seated people under the canopy

notable_agents.action: man in light blue shirt sitting at plastic table eating
woman in red shirt sitting at plastic table eating

entered.detail: purple fabric canopy covering the outdoor seating area
white plastic picnic table with bottles on it
white and red plastic chairs around the tables
large metal industrial buildings and pipes in the background
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke

segments.scene_description: The character exits the food stall and walks under a purple canopy into an outdoor seating area. The camera approaches a plastic table where two people are seated eating breakfast. Industrial structures and smokestacks rise in the background against a bright morning sky, with the pickles sign now visible on the right wall as the character passes by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the cramped interior of a food stall into a bright, industrial outdoor seating area. It begins inside the narrow stall, facing a wire mesh service counter cluttered with disposable cups and walls plastered with sticky notes. As the character moves forward, the view passes a yellow Pickles sign illuminated by warm artificial light before exiting the stall. The scene then opens up under a purple canopy, shifting from the enclosed space to an outdoor area where the camera approaches a plastic table with two people eating breakfast. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal towering industrial structures and smokestacks rising against a bright morning sky.
